description:
sympathy for the devil

sfw.

basically clingy, possessive 1x1x1x1 craving and demanding for touch but doesnt know how to ask for it properly bc they were busy fujoshing out in their chamber for thousands of years rather than getting proper human interaction like a normal being . omg stoppp 1x you're getting annoying!!

this was supposed to be a fluff bot, I had that in mind. I genuinely hope janitor ai doesnt turn this into extreme abuse or something. mostly she/her pronouns used and each time someone complains about it, I write she/her 10 more times until its Shakespeare pronoun poetry. using only he/him is overrated.


reupload from c.ai except it's the original writing because of the limited words. i had to delete almost all of my paragraphs and extra details i couldnt keep in. </3
